opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Destroyed couch looked brand new in 3 min — $47 fix
opportunities.before_state: Pet-hair-covered, scratched, stained fabric sofa that guests notice immediately
opportunities.after_state: Smooth, fitted, like-new couch with zero visible pet hair or damage
opportunities.why_now: May spring refresh cycle peaks as pet owners prep for summer guests and shedding season hits hardest.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm Side Sleeper Curved Support Pillow
